description_long: This is a large, traditional wooden wine barrel with a cylindrical body and rounded ends, reinforced by three prominent black metal hoops. The front face features a wooden plaque labeled 'Wine Barrel 2020' and a metal spigot at the bottom for dispensing liquid. The wood is light brown with visible grain and some natural imperfections, giving it an authentic, aged appearance. The rear face is plain, showing only the wood texture, while one side displays a stenciled marking 'T3 25.11.20' in black. The barrel sits on a simple wooden cradle stand, elevating it slightly above the ground. The top has a small wooden bung, suggesting the barrel can be filled or sealed as needed.
description: A large, light brown wooden wine barrel with black metal hoops, a spigot, and a wooden stand. It features labeling and a stenciled date, with a rustic, aged appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden plaque labeled 'Wine Barrel 2020' and a metal spigot at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the stenciled marking 'T3 25.11.20' and the curvature of the barrel with metal hoops.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain wooden end with no labeling or spigot, only natural wood grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no visible markings, highlighting the wood texture and metal hoops.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: Wine Barrel 2020 plaque, T3 25.11.20 stenciled text
